Heir apparent: The Autumn Sun accepts the mantle as head of Arrowfield roster

Superbly bred Loera is a candidate for the Listed Denise’s Joy Stakes after a strong maiden win, while stakes placed Marsept smashed her rivals at Geelong. Juvenile winners for Extreme Choice and All Too Hard both show plenty of upside.

Little Avondale Stud’s 2026 roster will be headed up by proven Group 1 sire Per Incanto, whose fee leaps to NZ$75,000 plus GST. His G1 Blue Diamond Stakes winning son Little Brose will stand his second season at NZ$15,000 plus GST.

Dual Group 2 winner Alflaila was the South Island’s most popular stallion in 2025 and he will stand his second season in 2026 at a fee of NZ$7,000 plus GST. His barnmate, Ancient Spirit, will stand for the same fee.

Spirited bidding battles in this week's Magic Millions Digital Sale resulted in a new high water mark for the rejuvenated platform, where Boomer Bloodstock and Greenfields Lodge secured multiple stakes winner Admiration Express for $280,000.

The autumn is done and dusted at Randwick, and form analyst Nic Ashman shares who was the most impressive on the 10-race card, as well as weighing in on whether Jigsaw should consider a $20 million tilt in the spring.

Hanseatic became the 15th second season sire to produce a stakes winner on Saturday with Rohesia's Listed Nitschke Stakes win, a reward for Rosemont Stud's Anthony Mithen's patience and belief in the stallion. TTR put the second season sires' table under the microscope to see who has performed up to expectations.

Rising costs, the fuel crisis, and the shifting face of the yearling market has already has many farms around the country feeling tight, but Australia's breeding hub in the Hunter Valley is under additional pressure as a drought envelopes Scone and surrounds.

Two of Godolphin’s dual Group 1-winning 3-year-olds will join the Darley roster this season. G1 Coolmore Stud Stakes winner Tentyris will stand at Kelvinside for $88,000 inc. GST, while G1 VRC Derby hero Observer will take up duties at Northwood Park for $33,000 inc. GST.
